# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-name
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-name
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-name
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-container
        image: container-image
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service2-name
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service2-name
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service2-name
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-container-2
        image: container-image-2
